citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 0945 on 2/13/2026.
The inspector attempted to contact the licensee/registrant by Gate was locked; I called the contact number with no
response, left a message and stayed in the area for thirty minutes.. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and
records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may
result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 0945 on 2/13/2026. 
The inspector attempted to contact the licensee/registrant by Gate was locked; I called the contact number with no 
response, left a message and stayed in the area for thirty minutes.. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and 
records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may 
result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
